blocks.label: External Paving

variables.label: Subbase
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall propose a subbase construction suitable for the expected traffic load.

variables.label: Edge restraint
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall propose edge restraint compatible with the paving system and site levels.

blocks.label: Applicable Standards
blocks.text:
All works shall comply with:

- CROW Publication 320 (paving design)
- CROW Publication 321 (paving materials)
- NEN-EN 1338 (concrete paving blocks)
- NEN-EN 1339 (concrete paving flags)
- NEN-EN 1340 (concrete kerbs)

Safety: VCA** certification required.

Attach: VCA certificate, material certificates, compaction test results.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per m² paving complete (incl. subbase, sand bed, laying)
Per m1 edge restraint (opsluitbanden)
Per m1 kerbs
Subgrade preparation: per m²
Mobilisation / demobilisation: lump sum
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Minimum area surcharge
- Complex patterns
- Weekend working
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Excavation (by others)
- Foundation works
- Underground services
- Landscaping
- Permanent road markings
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule — per m², per m1
2. Method statement
3. VCA** certificate
4. Material certificates
5. Estimated duration
6. General terms and conditions
7. All deviations with justification
